name: IDT CORP
summary: IDT Corporation is a fintech and communications solutions provider focused on underserved consumer and B2B markets. Key offerings include NRS, a POS platform for independent retailers; BOSS Money, a cross-border remittance service; net2phone, an AI-powered UCaaS/CCaaS platform; IDT Digital Payments for prepaid digital products; BOSS Revolution for international calling; and IDT Global for wholesale voice and SMS termination services.

products.name: NRS POS Platform
products.description: Integrated POS hardware and software for independent convenience, bodega, liquor, grocery, and tobacco retailers in the U.S.

products.name: NRS PAY
products.description: Payment processing enabling retailers to accept credit, debit, and electronic benefit transfer payments.

products.name: NRS Digital Media
products.description: Nationwide network of customer-facing screens providing advertisers access to urban, multi-cultural consumer markets.

products.name: NRS Insights
products.description: Transaction data and analytics service for advertisers and marketers.

products.name: BOSS Money
products.description: Cross-border money transfer service to 50 destination countries, accessible via app and retail agents.

products.name: net2phone UCaaS
products.description: Unified communications as a service for businesses primarily in North and South America.

products.name: net2phone CCaaS
products.description: Contact center as a service offering for businesses worldwide.

products.name: net2phone Coach
products.description: AI-driven workforce intelligence and coaching platform for business communications.

products.name: net2phone AI Agent
products.description: Customizable AI-powered agent for customer experiences across sales, support, and administrative tasks.

products.name: BOSS Revolution
products.description: Prepaid international long-distance voice calling service via app and retail agents, targeting immigrant communities.

products.name: IDT Digital Payments
products.description: Prepaid digital offerings including mobile airtime top-up, data bundles, digital gift cards, and eSIMs.

products.name: Zendit
products.description: B2B prepaid-as-a-service platform enabling businesses and developers to offer prepaid digital products.

products.name: IDT Global
products.description: Wholesale international voice and SMS termination and outsourced traffic management for telecoms worldwide.

products.name: IDT Express
products.description: Self-provisioning portal for IDT Global serving small and medium businesses.

partnerships.description: Sold a stake in net2phone subsidiary to AT&T for approximately $1.1 billion in cash in 2000; IDT later repurchased net2phone.
